title: cerastium pumilum var. petraeum
intro: Cerastium pumilum var. petraeum, also known as Alpine Snow or Rock Flower, is a low-growing, perennial plant that belongs to the carnation family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating colds and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, which may help alleviate symptoms such as congestion and coughing, and its health benefits also include potential antioxidant and immune-boosting effects. Herbal preparations of Cerastium pumilum var. petraeum include infusions and teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
